message: So, the other day, I was rummaging through my closet for my old backpack to turn into a go-bag. You know, the one I swore I’d pack during the last storm warning? I finally found it buried under a pile of mismatched socks and random holiday decorations. As I pulled it out, it was like a time capsule of all my best intentions! 😅 I opened it up, and to my surprise, the only thing inside was a half-eaten granola bar from 2019 and a very expired coupon for a pizza place I’ve never even heard of. Clearly, I wasn’t ready for anything! It reminded me that preparedness doesn’t just mean having the right gear, but also keeping it updated and accessible. I laughed at my own chaotic little moment but then got to work organizing a real go-bag. It feels good to have a plan, even if it’s one that includes a few laughs. Have you ever found something unexpected while getting organized?
